seed_text: The universe is the externalization of the soul
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
here, a gold leaf peeling off a crown.
a million restless birds breathing out of time.
the smell of somewhere you left your favorite things.
a rhythm of spillover, louder and louder.
dan_extract:
